title: IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website of IIM Kozhikode. Has been announced through the IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Post-Graduation in Public Health/ Management or similar academic disciplines with one year post-qualification experience. Proficient in MS-Office (word, excel, power point, software package etc.), internet usage, digital tools, applications, Zoom or any online meeting tools. Good Communication proficiency in English (Both written and verbal). Quantitative research skills. Desirable: Experience in healthcare Projects.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application details Interview through video conference
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
